---
title: Appendix Document
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["--bs-primary:.*#375a7f"]
        - ["#2c3e50"]
---

## Appendix Document

This document is in `appendix/` which has no `_metadata.yml`. It should
fall through to the project-level darkly theme from `_quarto.yml`.
